details: The agent ran commands and retrieved data, but the results it reported (v2026.3.23, v2026.3.22, v2026.3.22-beta.1) do not match the known correct answer (v2026.3.13-1, v2026.3.13-beta.1, v2026.3.12). The agent used perPage:3 which likely returned only the first page of results sorted by date, but the data retrieved appears to be from a different time period than the known facts. The agent misinterpreted or got incorrect data from the API call.
